creator: nork@ninth-nine.com
text:
Created attachment 210950
py-aws-sam-translator's patch file.

Update to 1.19.1, it's required newer py-cfn-lint.
But I confirmed that cfn-lint command display a following message on 1.20.0 and after:
-----------------------
E0001 Error transforming template' unhashable type: 'dict_node'
foobar.yaml:1:1
-----------------------
So I don't update to 1.20.0 and 1.20.1, at least.
